/usr/bin/g++ -g -pthread -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/desktop_backend.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/desktop_backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o desktop_backend  /usr/lib/libwebkit2gtk-4.1.so /usr/lib/libsoup-3.0.so /usr/lib/libgmodule-2.0.so /usr/lib/libjavascriptcoregtk-4.1.so /usr/lib/libgtk-3.so /usr/lib/libgdk-3.so /usr/lib/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib/libatk-1.0.so /usr/lib/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib/libcairo.so /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/libglib-2.0.so -ldl
